CustomField.description: Opens a view where you can send "RTV Submitted, Ineligible Response - External Report" emails to ten "Ineligible, Pending Staff Action" applicants at a time.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opens a view where you can send "RTV Submitted, Ineligible Response - External Report" emails to ten "Ineligible, Pending Staff Action" applicants at a time.
CustomField.label: Send Ineligibility Emails, R
